holdings.infoBox: VNM is an equity ETF with a total of 57 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vinhomes JSC stock at 11.06%, Vingroup JSC at 10.21%, Masan Group at 5.89%, Hoa Phat Group JSC at 5.22%, and Masan Consumer at 5.18%.

overview.description: The VanEck Vietnam ETF (VNM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MarketVector Vietnam Local index, a market-cap-weighted index of Vietnamese stocks VNM was launched on Aug 14, 2009 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: Asian Currencies Consolidate Before Decision by Warsh-Led FOMC
data.text: Asian currencies consolidated against the dollar before first decision by a FOMC led by Chairman Kevin Warsh later.

data.title: Price caps, taking the stairs, and short-sleeved shirts: How countries are coping with the Iran war energy shock
data.text: Countries around the world have scrambled to cope with the fallout of the energy shock from the Iran war. This comes as the Iran war stretches into its third week.

data.title: Vietnam's Economy Is on Fire. Why Its Stocks Aren't.
data.text: Vietnam's economy is growing, but there still aren't many stocks for investors to choose from, even 35 years after Communist leaders launched market reform.
